title: OASIS 3.0.18
release_notes:
FIXES

· Legacy Converter example generation now validates generated examples against length, regex, pattern, and allowed-value constraints before using them.

· Legacy conversion now blocks with an action-required report when Excel template constraints cannot produce valid examples, instead of emitting invalid or empty fallback examples.

· Example validation now follows OpenAPI/JSON Schema pattern search semantics, while still respecting explicit anchors in source regex constraints.
